grepable.

author: Arkadiusz Hiler
message:
amend! HACK: winebus: Disable SDL2.30 new behavior for the SDL unix backend.

HACK: winebus: Disable SDL2.30 new behavior for the SDL unix backend.

Starting with 517a3d20e8cf ("Support calling SteamAPI_InitEx() before
SDL_Init(SDL_INIT_GAMEPAD)") SDL no longer respects overriding
SteamVirtualGamepadInfo using hint system. It queries env varaible using
`SDL_getenv_unsafe()` so we have to completely unset it for
`winedevice.exe`.

SDL also has a hack that disables overriding if SDL_GetExeName() ==
"wine64-preloader" but that doesn't work on ARM64.

CW-Bug-Id: #23185
CW-Bug-Id: #27027

author: Bernhard Kölbl
message:
windows.media.speech: Fix a trace typo.

(cherry picked from commit 1d744d4ca948c7ea403a786f21c5fe4ef6de08fe)

CW-Bug-Id: #27011

author: Bernhard Kölbl
message:
windows.media.speech: Don't access the all voices vector view directly.

The vector view might be uninitialized by the time
ISpeechSynthesizer_put_Voice is called, so get it via the "official"
way through IInstalledVoicesStatic.

Wine-Bug: https://bugs.winehq.org/show_bug.cgi?id=59694
(cherry picked from commit 193f7b302207706472e502c8281cab660211a092)

CW-Bug-Id: #27011

fixup! Use FEX wow64/ARM64EC dll names

So when using a prefix from different arch has 32 bit rundll32.exe working
and this process is not broken very early.

author: Yuxuan Shui

ntdll: When overriding dlls, update len.

Otherwise build_import_name will access OOB when reading the dll name.

author: Conor McCarthy
message:
gdiplus: Bypass span combination for intersected rects.

(cherry picked from commit 7ece4365d6c0250baa5557e76fc4d485e8b831a6)

author: Conor McCarthy
message:
gdiplus: Implement software region fill for bitmap images.

Implementation via hregion fill is relatively slow, and can cause issues
in video playback where gdiplus paths are used to render a subtitle
string once per frame. They Are Billions exhibits this issue.

(cherry picked from commit 99985fc975a21e3b39540ee3b143d20798436846)

CW-Bug-Id: #26734

author: Conor McCarthy
message:
gdiplus: Refactor SOFTWARE_GdipFillRegion() to separate bitmap handling.

This make it relatively simple to add an alternative to
alpha_blend_pixels_hrgn() for bitmap rendering.

(cherry picked from commit 62e4ea754b8320bfdd5c4ea8da2a48364dda23a7)

message:
winex11: Use unsigned long for monitor indices generation.

Avoiding invisible padding in the structure that could make memcmp
